label: 第172話
source_locator: 単行本20巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: レジィは大量の重量を影へ落として伏黒を押し潰そうとする。伏黒は体育館のプールと満象を利用して荷重を返し、最後の駆け引きへ持ち込む。
summary_full: レジィは車両三台分、合計約2.4トンの重量を伏黒の影へ落とし、さらに家屋を実体化して圧殺を狙う。伏黒は領域を解除して体育館のプールへ逃れ、影に沈めていた満象の重量を逆にレジィへ加える。互いに大きく消耗する中、レジィは伏黒が玉犬を使えないと判断して接近戦を挑む。しかし伏黒は、プールと領域を利用して玉犬の存在を隠していた。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 恵 springs another trap on レジィ・スター as their battle reaches its climax. Both fighters struggle under extreme pressure to prove who can bear the most weight!
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: レジィ succumbs to 満象's weight and falls into the shadow. The average human being can only withstand about five to six units of g-force before losing consciousness. 恵 weighs sixty kilograms and is carrying 2.4 tons of weight, which equates to forty units of g-force. A fully matured elephant weights three to six tons and 恵's domain increases the precision of his 術式 , replicating 満象 's weight realistically. With that weight falling atop him, レジィ fractured his right fibula and heel bone. Both combatants are under immense pressure and could be crushed to death at any moment. レジィ laments over not saving the trucks he used earlier for more weight at this moment. He's been soaked with water by 満象, but there are still receipts he can release, including his ace . レジィ wonders if he can enter the shadow to release his ace and finish off 恵. He dismisses this idea because anything caught in the shadow after its dispelled might be unable to escape. It's possible in a scenario that after 恵 dies, レジィ remains trapped inside the shadow. Furthermore, he's unsure of what it's actually like inside the liquid shadow substance. He decides this option is too risky and tries to withstand the elephant's weight while releasing his ace in the hole. レジィ uses one of the cars to rescue himself. レジィ attempts to hold up the elephant with one arm while taking out the proper receipt. Before he can fully activate 再契象 , レジィ succumbs to 満象's weight and falls into the shadow. Without any buoyancy or resistance inside the shadow, レジィ falls into the darkness and begins to lose consciousness without any access to oxygen. With レジィ likely defeated, 恵 waits until he's sure his opponent is dead before dispelling the domain and emptying his shadow. Suddenly, one of the cars inside 恵's shadow takes レジィ back to the surface. Things レジィ re-creates disappear after he gives them a command. He refrained from doing so to the cars until now because he wanted to weight to bear down on 恵. Rescued from certain demise, レジィ commends 恵's strength and admits he's a strong sorcerer before immediately stating that he's even stronger. He activates 再契象 and summons a small, two-story wooden house that weighs at least thirty tons. レジィ unleashes his ace in the hole. The situation drastically changes in the next moment. Despite using his ace, レジィ abruptly finds himself underwater being strangled by 恵 from behind. 恵's weight is being used to drown レジィ, so he's forced to deactivate his 術式 and unregister the weight of the cars. レジィ is able to swim back to the surface for air and realizes he's inside a pool on the basement level of the gymnasium. 恵 fled into his shadow and ended the domain, making it so the house broke the floor and forced レジィ to fall into the pool below. It's unclear how 恵 was able to move despite the weight, but レジィ theorizes that he did so by ejecting himself from the shadow. 恵 walks up to his opponent as レジィ crawls his way out of the water. 恵 tells レジィ his receipts are too wet to use now. Normally, splashing the receipts with water isn't enough to make the print fade, so that alone isn't enough to stop レジィ from producing things with 再契象. However, soaking the receipts prevents レジィ from fulfilling the activation condition that requires burning the receipts with 呪力 . " From this point on... it's a physical fight! " レジィ doesn't outwardly agree with 恵 and counters with the notion that 恵 can't summon 式神 anymore. 恵 agrees that this is the case and suggests their exchange will be a physical fight from now on. However, レジィ doesn't actually believe this. He knows 恵 let go of him in the pool and waited before immediately attacking again so he could replenish his 術式 after dispelling the domain. He expects 恵 to summon a 式神 and plans on countering 恵 as soon as he lets up to do so. Additionally, レジィ is confident none of 恵's 式神 can finish him because he believes he's still unable to use 玉犬 . レジィ suffers lethal consequences for dismissing 玉犬. In a one-on-one close quarters combat exchange, レジィ is able to gain the upper hand on 恵. He admits レジィ is a tough opponent, made evident by his ability to withstand 満象's weight earlier. He's also a talented martial artist with fine-tuned 呪力 reinforcement techniques. レジィ tries to use his talent to pressure 恵 into summoning a 式神 other than the dog. Just before レジィ is able to land a direct hit on 恵, a portion of the far left side of レジィ's face, his ear, and much of his left shoulder are completely sheered off. Having suffered a lethal blow at blinding speed, レジィ is taken back by the quickness of the attack. He looks back to see none other than 玉犬: 渾. It has two holes in its nose from the knives as well as tufts of レジィ's hair and flesh in its mouth. 恵 was waiting until レジィ had completely dismissed the dog, confirming the latter's earlier statement that a sorcerer is nothing but a con artist. レジィ repeats this as he collapses to the ground in a pool of his own blood.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: レジィ・スター 伏黒恵
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 死滅回游 伏黒恵 vs. レジィ・スター (終了) 伏黒恵 vs. レジィ・スター (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 玉犬: 渾 満象 領域展開：嵌合暗翳庭 玉犬: 渾 満象 レジィ・スターの術式 再契象

key_events_verified_phase9: レジィが大量の重量を伏黒の影へ加える
伏黒がプールを利用して荷重から脱出する
伏黒が満象の重量をレジィへ返す
伏黒が玉犬を隠したまま最終局面へ誘導する
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
